allow: Bash(sqlite3 /Users/paul/Side_Project/YES_Attendance/prisma/dev.db "SELECT category || ': ' || GROUP_CONCAT\(value, ', '\) FROM DropdownOption GROUP BY category;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/paul/Side_Project/YES_Attendance/prisma/dev.db "SELECT g.name, COUNT\(DISTINCT t.id\) as team_count, COUNT\(DISTINCT m.id\) as member_count FROM \\`Group\\` g LEFT JOIN Team t ON g.id = t.groupId LEFT JOIN Member m ON t.id = m.teamId WHERE g.name IN \('믿음', '소망', '사랑', '샬롬'\) GROUP BY g.name ORDER BY g.order;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/paul/Side_Project/YES_Attendance/prisma/dev.db "SELECT g.name, COUNT\(DISTINCT t.id\) as team_count FROM \\"Group\\" g LEFT JOIN Team t ON g.id = t.groupId WHERE g.name IN \('믿음', '소망', '사랑', '샬롬'\) GROUP BY g.name;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/paul/Side_Project/YES_Attendance/prisma/dev.db "SELECT t.id, t.name, g.name as group_name, COUNT\(m.id\) as member_count FROM Team t LEFT JOIN \\"Group\\" g ON t.groupId = g.id LEFT JOIN Member m ON t.id = m.teamId WHERE g.name IN \('믿음', '소망', '사랑', '샬롬'\) GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY g.name, t.name;")
